mapper.select: SELECT distinct o.TABLENAME as tableName, o.OBJECTNAME as objectName, f.PARTITION_RECNO partitionRecno FROM synlte.object o LEFT JOIN synlte.OBJECTFIELD f ON o.OBJECTID = f.OBJECTID

SELECT DETECT_ID detectId,RES_ID resId,PROJECT_NAME projectName,TABLE_NAME_EN tableNameEn,TABLE_TYPE tableType,DETECTED_TYPE detectedType,IS_DELETED isDeleted,TABLE_NAME_CN tableNameCn,DATA_FORMAT dataFormat,PROVIDE_TYPE provideType, PROVIDER provider,PROVIDE_UNIT provideUnit,PROVIDE_TEL provideTel,PROVIDE_TIME provideTime,INCEPTOR inceptor,INCEPT_UNIT inceptUnit,INCEPT_TEL inceptTel,INCEPT_TIME inceptTime,INCEPT_DESC inceptDesc,INCEPT_TYPE inceptType, DATA_LEVEL dataLevel,TRADE_CLASSIFY tradeClassify,BUSINESS_MARK businessMark,ROUTINE_UNIT routineUnit,ROUTINE_CODE routineCode,ROUTINE_LINKMAN routineLinkman,ROUTINE_TEL routineTel,MANAGE_UNIT manageUnit,MANAGE_UNIT_CODE manageUnitCode, RES_POSTION resPostion,POSTION_DESC postionDesc,APP_NAME appName,APP_CODE appCode,APP_MANAGE_UNIT appManageUnit, APP_BUILD_UNIT appBuildUnit, SOURCE_CLASSIFY sourceClassify, SOURCE_CODE sourceCode, RES_DESC resDesc FROM DS_DETECTED_TABLE WHERE IS_DELETED = 0
